content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

July 3, 1990

Councilmember Bob Henderson  
City of Whittier  
13230 Penn Street  
Whittier, CA 90602

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. G-90-426

Dear Councilman Henderson:

We have received your letter of June 18, 1990, requesting advice regarding your obligations under the Ralph M. Brown Act. The Fair Political Practices Commission’s jurisdiction encompasses only actions in violation of the Political Reform Act (Government Code Sections 81000-91015). The state Attorney General’s office is responsible for interpreting and enforcing the provisions of the Brown Act. We suggest you contact them. You may send your inquiry to:

Department of Justice  
Public Inquiry Unit  
P.O. Box 944255  
Sacramento, CA 90602

Please fell free to contact me at (916)322-5901 if you have any questions.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
Acting General Counsel

By: Mark Morodomi  
Staff Counsel
